verifier: independent arithmetic/schema recomputation; does not import production solver

coverage_map.name: controlled_transitions
coverage_map.coverage: saved transition estimates only; not preference estimation

coverage_map.name: local_rank_arithmetic
coverage_map.coverage: rank calculation for saved population Jacobian; not proof of global identification

coverage_map.name: hard_constraint
coverage_map.coverage: selected restricted candidate feasibility and reported slack only; not global optimality

coverage_map.name: welfare_accounting
coverage_map.coverage: accounting identity in saved counterfactual rows; not normative completeness or external validity

coverage_map.name: search_metadata
coverage_map.coverage: presence/count of retained restricted-search starts and traces; not optimizer correctness
